brand.name: ТВОЙ ХОД
brand.logoAlt: ТВОЙ ХОД. Finances as a game

meta.title: ТВОЙ ХОД — a smart game about your money decisions
meta.description: Simulated months for adults 30+: salary, safety fund, events, needs, and consequences — zero risk to your real account. Telegram, browser, or PWA.

hero.eyebrow: Smart game · ages 30+ · Telegram, browser, PWA
hero.subtitle: Test financial decisions in a safe sandbox: game “months”, honest numbers, and consequences — no risk to your real wallet. Spot blind spots before life charges full price.
hero.screenCaption: In-game dashboard — same screens in Telegram and PWA
hero.status: Pre-Alpha: play in browser now · Telegram launch in preparation
hero.monetkaQuote: I'm Monetka — I'll help you read the numbers without panic or lectures.
hero.monetkaBubble: A mistake in-game is a lesson. In life, better to see it early

audience.title: Sound familiar?
audience.subtitle: Not a course or “get rich in a week”. For people who earn fine but want a clear picture, not chaos in their head.

cards.title: Income without calm
cards.text: Money comes in, but it's unclear if goals, mortgage, and “living now” fit — with a background hum of anxiety.

cards.title: Afraid to get it wrong
cards.text: Deposits, bonds, insurance — heard the theory, fear the wrong move in life. In the game, mistakes are free.

cards.title: No time for a course
cards.text: You want trade-offs and outcomes, not 40 hours of video. One visit — a few minutes; a run — at your pace.

how.title: Core loop in one minute
how.subtitle: The period does not tick down by the clock — you close the month when ready. Pause and leaving the app keep progress.

steps.title: Open month
steps.text: Claim salary on tap (miss before close — no pay that month), open events, top up the safety fund, visit Finance and Needs.

steps.title: Two life events
steps.text: Choice cards — not a quiz, but trade-offs for cash, obligations, and four need bars (comfort, status, social, health).

steps.title: Close the month
steps.text: Debt payments, asset income, insurance and investments apply. Overdue and negative cash sting — but stay educational.

steps.title: Toward victory
steps.text: Goal chain from your template (Victory v2), period analytics. Win usually not before period seven — time to learn.

features.title: Inside a run
features.subtitle: Unified server economy: UI numbers match month-close math.

showcase.title: Period, cash & safety fund
showcase.text: Salary only on tap; safety fund separate from cash — one monthly rhythm on the dashboard.

showcase.title: Period finances
showcase.text: Template assets and liabilities, deposits and bonds, insurance — clear consequences, not jargon for show.

showcase.title: Choice events
showcase.text: Two events per period — life situations with balance and habit consequences.

showcase.title: Goals & analytics
showcase.text: Victory v2 step chain and closed-period overview — see where the run is heading.

learn.title: What the simulation teaches
learn.subtitle: A habit of thinking in outcomes — respecting your intelligence.

cards.title: Safety fund
cards.text: Why to save when cash feels tight, and how it ties to obligations.

cards.title: Obligations
cards.text: Payments and overdue — without scare tactics or glamorized “quick cash”.

cards.title: Needs
cards.text: Comfort, status, social, health — “treat yourself” and burnout also have a price in numbers.

cards.title: Events
cards.text: Sometimes there is no perfect option — only trade-offs between now and later.

cards.title: Discipline
cards.text: Income doesn't auto-deposit — miss an action in a period, and it shows.

cards.title: Capital & risk
cards.text: Investments and insurance simplified — understand choices, don't memorize terms.

peek.title: In-game UI
peek.subtitle: MQX: one visual language on dashboard, finance, and events — in Telegram and browser.

screenAlts.dashboard.cash: Dashboard crop: salary and safety fund
screenAlts.capital.summary: Capital screen crop: income and obligations
screenAlts.capital.invest: Capital screen crop: investments and insurance

panels.label: Dashboard
panels.title: Period & balances
panels.text: Cash, safety fund, needs, and Close month — on one screen.

panels.label: Finance
panels.title: Period capital
panels.text: Income, expenses, property, debt, investments, insurance — without clutter.

panels.label: Events
panels.title: Month decisions
panels.text: Compact choice cards; Monetka helps you read the situation, not replace it.

coach.title: Monetka — partner, not a bank bot
coach.lead: Short hints where the first glance is hard — no baby talk, no lecturing.
points: At run start — what to do in the first month.
On the dashboard — cash, safety fund, and needs.
In finance — what to open, buy, and close without noise.
In goals — victory steps in plain language.

modes.title: Two save modes
modes.subtitle: One brand — different ways to start a run.

game.title: Game
game.text: Quick start from templates: student, professional, mortgage, debt stack — no manual setup of every parameter.
points: Template sets opening state, lifestyle, and victory goal chain
Events and economy for game mode
Victory v2: template goals; win usually not before period seven

plan.title: Plan
plan.text: Your budget and “what if” — input wizard on the roadmap (MVP 2.0).

victory.title: Win and loss — transparent
victory.subtitle: Rules are visible in finance overview; the game doesn't punish by surprise.
points: Victory (Victory v2): goal chain from your run template — safety fund, investments, cashflow, etc.; usually not before period seven
Loss (cash): three months in a row with negative cash after close
Loss (needs): any of four need bars at zero for three months in a row
Mistakes in the simulator are lessons; the same patterns cost more in life

partners.title: Partners: channels & corporate pilots
partners.subtitle: ТВОЙ ХОД is edutainment for adults 30+: short sessions, growing depth, mascot Monetka, honest pedagogy.

points.title: Audience
points.text: 30+, “smart game” with substance: IT, management, families with mortgage — no grind for levels.

points.title: Channels
points.text: Telegram Mini App, browser, PWA — one product. The landing leads into the free simulation.

points.title: Stage
points.text: Pre-Alpha → Closed Alpha. Wellbeing / literacy pilots for companies — on request.

points.title: Compliance
points.text: Educational simulation, not investment advice. No payday loans, collectors, or gambling loops in content.

items.a: No. All amounts live inside the game simulation.
Adults 30+ who want a meaningful game with a finance theme — not a dry course or endless grind.
In the browser or as PWA via Play on this site. Public Telegram launch is in preparation.
A typical visit is 1–3 minutes; a run spans several “months” when you want. Months don't auto-close on a timer.
Yes: three periods in a row with negative cash, or three with a need bar at zero. Outcomes show in numbers.
Complete the Victory v2 goal chain from your template; usually not before period seven. Details in in-game finance overview.
No. The product is educational; real-life decisions are yours.

ctaBand.title: Take your first move in the simulator
ctaBand.text: Four game months are enough to feel the loop. We'll announce Telegram separately.

footer.tagline: ТВОЙ ХОД · Finances as a game
footer.legal: Not individual investment advice. A learning simulation.
